chapters.title: Circuit Design Basics
chapters.content: Designing electronic circuits starts with drawing schematics and testing on breadboards.

chapters.title: Analog Circuit Design
chapters.content: Analog circuits process continuous electrical signals.

chapters.title: Digital Circuit Design
chapters.content: Digital circuits process binary signals (0s and 1s).

chapters.title: PCB Design
chapters.content: Printed Circuit Boards (PCBs) connect electronic components permanently.

chapters.title: Testing & Troubleshooting
chapters.content: Testing ensures circuits work as designed and helps find faults.
